case_title: ROBERT SEALE VS. ANDRE WINGATE et al

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Robert Seale is present. Represented by Dante Cechinini.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Andre Wingate is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney,Morris Hirsch.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of October 01, 2012 is vacated.
